response.justification: While the candidate meets the baseline 15-year experience and BS requirement with solid systems engineering background, they lack the core qualification for this role: demonstrated expertise in AI with shipped products or platforms. Recent AI infrastructure work (MCP tooling, agent frameworks) is promising but too superficial and recent (<1 year) for a Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy. No evidence of director-level leadership, Master's/PhD in AI, or recognized thought leadership in AI space—all preferred/key indicators for this specific role.
strengths: 17 years of engineering experience across diverse domains
Entrepreneurial track record with GISCollective and recent AI infrastructure contributions
Systems engineering depth with high-performance, distributed work at scale
concerns: Minimal AI/ML expertise—only ~1 year in AI infrastructure tooling, no strategic AI products
No Master's/PhD in AI or recognized AI thought leadership required for principal-level strategy role
Director-level leadership not demonstrated—current staff title lacks evidence of influencing organizational strategy

key_factors.factor: AI expertise gap—no products or strategic depth
Solid systems engineering and entrepreneurial foundation
